title: Privacy Policy
description: This policy explains how Codevibe Technologies Private Limited collects and uses information when you contact us or use our website.

sections.title: Information we collect
paragraphs: We may collect information you submit via forms (such as name, email, company, and project details).
We may collect basic technical information (such as device and browser details) for security and performance purposes.

sections.title: How we use information
paragraphs: To respond to enquiries, provide requested information, and communicate about potential engagements.
To maintain the security and integrity of our website and services.

sections.title: Data retention
paragraphs: We retain enquiry information only as long as needed for communication, contractual, or legal purposes.

sections.title: Contact
paragraphs: For privacy-related questions, please reach out through our contact page.
